extortion.description: [AI generated] RedClayGourmet.com is a food producer renowned for their gourmet, craft-cooked pimento cheese spreads. The company prioritizes using natural, high quality ingredients sourced mainly from North Carolina, USA. Their range of flavors includes Classic Sharp Cheddar, Flame-Roasted Jalapeno, Hickory Smoked Cheddar, and Goat Cheese & Sun-Dried Tomato. They are committed to continuous innovation and superior taste.
